metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students take leadership roles in technical theatre, managing complex production elements. This course emphasizes professional technical standards, design sophistication, and preparation for advanced study or careers in technical theatre.
metadata.general_description: Advanced technical theatre course for leadership in production and design.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced technical theatre practitioners demonstrate mastery of design and production at professional standards.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 technical artists take leadership roles, make sophisticated design choices, and manage complex production challenges effectively.

big_ideas.statement: Sophisticated technical design is integral to theatrical storytelling and audience experience.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced designers understand how technical elements enhance narrative, establish mood, and contribute to artistic vision.

big_ideas.statement: Professional technical theatre requires both artistic sophistication and technical expertise.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students balance creative vision with technical feasibility, managing complex coordination and solving problems creatively.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced technical theatre work prepares students for professional careers or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional portfolios and expertise necessary for technical theatre careers or higher education.

competencies.raw: Design and create sophisticated scenic environments
i_can_statements: I can design complex set designs for full productions
I can create detailed technical drawings and specifications
I can coordinate complex construction and installation
I can solve technical design challenges creatively

competencies.raw: Design and manage advanced lighting systems
i_can_statements: I can design complex lighting for sophisticated productions
I can program and operate advanced lighting consoles
I can create lighting that supports dramatic storytelling
I can troubleshoot and maintain professional lighting systems

competencies.raw: Design and implement complex sound and audio systems
i_can_statements: I can design sophisticated sound designs for productions
I can operate professional audio systems during performances
I can integrate live sound with recorded elements
I can solve audio technical challenges

competencies.raw: Lead production teams and manage complex productions
i_can_statements: I can take leadership roles in technical production
I can coordinate multiple technical departments
I can manage budgets, timelines, and resources
I can problem-solve complex production challenges

competencies.raw: Analyze design choices and their theatrical impact
i_can_statements: I can evaluate how design choices serve dramatic storytelling
I can understand relationships between design and performance
I can assess effectiveness of technical design
I can recognize artistic sophistication in design
I can articulate professional standards for technical theatre
I can evaluate work against industry benchmarks
I can understand safety, accessibility, and professional protocols
I can recognize excellence in professional technical theatre

competencies.raw: Reflect on technical growth and artistic voice
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my technical development and expertise
I can identify my design interests and artistic approach
I can assess readiness for professional technical theatre
I can articulate my design philosophy

competencies.raw: Engage with design history, theory, and contemporary practice
i_can_statements: I can understand design traditions and evolution
I can recognize design movements and significant designers
I can participate in conversations about contemporary design
I can understand design's role in theatre and culture

competencies.raw: Create professional design documentation and specifications
i_can_statements: I can create professional technical drawings and plots
I can develop detailed design specifications
I can maintain comprehensive technical documentation
I can organize complex technical information

competencies.raw: Lead and communicate with technical teams
i_can_statements: I can present designs clearly and compellingly
I can provide technical leadership and instruction
I can collaborate effectively with designers and craftspeople
I can resolve technical problems through clear communication

competencies.raw: Document technical work and production processes
i_can_statements: I can maintain detailed production records
I can document technical innovations and solutions
I can create reports on technical progress
I can preserve technical documentation

competencies.raw: Articulate design concepts and artistic intent
i_can_statements: I can present design concepts to production teams
I can write about design and explain artistic reasoning
I can discuss my work with collaborators and audiences
I can develop design portfolio

competencies.raw: Explore diverse design traditions and contemporary practice
i_can_statements: I can study design from diverse cultures and periods
I can understand diverse design aesthetics and approaches
I can incorporate diverse traditions into contemporary work
I can develop personal design voice

competencies.raw: Explore emerging technologies and innovative design
i_can_statements: I can engage with emerging theatre technologies
I can experiment with innovative design approaches
I can integrate new media and technologies creatively
I can push boundaries of traditional design
I can create professional portfolio of technical work
I can establish professional networks in theatre
I can seek mentorship and professional guidance
I can build reputation as emerging technical artist

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional technical theatre career
i_can_statements: I can identify professional goals in technical theatre
I can develop plan for advanced study or career
I can explore diverse technical theatre specializations
I can commit to lifelong learning in technical theatre

areas.name: Advanced Scenic Design and Construction
topics: Complex scenic design for full productions

areas.name: Advanced Lighting Design and Technology
topics: Programming and operation of professional consoles
Color theory and advanced lighting effects

areas.name: Advanced Sound Design and Audio Technology
areas.raw: Advanced Sound Design and Audio Technology
